title: Profitable Pest Control Store – Absentee Operated
description:
Absentee owned and operated. Thirty+ year old niche retail pest control supply store.

This established retail store offers pest management products typically used by professional pest control companies and exterminators, often at savings of up to 70 percent. It is located on a major thoroughfare in Tampa with strong street visibility.

The business features loyal, repeat customers, two well trained employees, a long established location, and excellent five star reviews. The seller does not live in the area and operates the business in a largely absentee capacity.

This is an excellent opportunity for an aggressive new owner to expand through increased advertising, the addition of e commerce sales, and potential future locations.

The financials reflect absentee ownership. A full time working owner could increase earnings by approximately $35,000 by reducing payroll and operating the business directly.

Listing # 924-01600

Ad#:2485638
